addToCart: body > div:nth-child(4) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(5) > button:nth-child(2)
increaseQuantityBtn: body > div:nth-child(4) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(1) > div:nth-child(2) > div:nth-child(2) > button:nth-child(3)
price: body div div div div div:nth-child(1) div:nth-child(3) p:nth-child(2)
totalPrice: body div div div div div:nth-child(1) div:nth-child(4) p:nth-child(2)
contShopBtn: button[class='inline-flex font-bold items-center gap-2 text-black cursor-pointer']
